meta.title: Career Twilight | Fables Monster Studio
meta.description: A short corporate sci-fi horror scenario for Mothership 1E. Evacuate the Twilight before classified experiments and systemic failure consume the mission.

hero.title: CAREER TWILIGHT
hero.tagline: A routine corporate evacuation mission. But could this be the twilight of your career?

intro.polaroidCaption: Dr. Sofia Reiner — Head of R&D Lab
intro.p1: A short sci-fi horror scenario for the Mothership® Sci-Fi Horror Role Playing Game 1E. The crew is sent to the Twilight, a corporate research vessel, to evacuate the staff and prisoners still on board.
intro.p2: Something went wrong on Twilight long before you arrived. Ambitions, paranoid secrecy, and systemic errors led to a catastrophe. Now the Twilight is a ticking time bomb ready to go off.
intro.p3: …Just another contract. But could this be the twilight of your career?

release.visualText: The trifold, handouts, and ship map are shown together so Wardens can see what is ready for the table.
release.trifoldText: A fold-out scenario built to read before play and keep close during the session.
release.handoutsText: In-world documents to hand out during briefings, discoveries, or tense table moments.
release.shipAssetsText: An isometric ship map helps the table understand the vessel and track the crew's route.
release.licenseText: This product is based on the Mothership® Sci-Fi Horror Role Playing Game, published by Tuesday Knight Games. This product is published under license. MOTHERSHIP® is a registered trademark of Tuesday Knight Games. All rights reserved. For additional information, visit
release.missionText: Evacuate the six employees and five corporate prison inmates still aboard the Twilight. Activate the ship's autonomous operating mode. Return without damaging corporate property.
release.statusText: The aft section is locked down. The remaining staff are frightened, evasive, or worse. The prisoners know less than they should. Somewhere inside the ship's failing systems, the truth is waiting to be found.
release.manifestText: The package includes what you need to read the scenario, prep the session, print the extras, and reference key material during play.
features: A short sci-fi horror scenario for Mothership 1E
A corporate evacuation mission aboard the Twilight
A locked-down research vessel with keyed locations
Scientists, prisoners, synthetic personnel, and hidden agendas
Escalating threats, hard choices, and consequences for what the crew exposes, steals, sells, or buries
Hooks for corporate crews, mercenaries, pirates, or Syndicate agents
updateText: Career Twilight already includes the illustrated scenario PDF, printer-friendly PDF, EPUB version, Twilight map, and selected bonus artwork.
Additional artwork and an original music pack are planned for future updates.
Existing buyers will receive future files through the itch.io product page.
release.wardenText: This page is written to be mostly player-safe. The downloadable PDF contains the full scenario, including secrets, threats, consequences, and Warden-facing details.
release.warningText: Gore, violence, dismemberment, madness, human experimentation, loss of identity.

timeline.title: RESTRICTED — CLEARANCE LEVEL: WARDEN ONLY
timeline.warning: This section contains full plot details and spoilers. If you are a player, stop reading now.

entries.text: The Corporation purchased the tourist vessel Twilight and retrofitted it into a research laboratory.

Dr. Sofia Reiner took charge of the lab and began developing technology to integrate human consciousness into android bodies. Corporate prison inmates were shipped to the Twilight for experimentation.

Having made significant progress, Dr. Reiner secretly began testing the technology on her own staff — systematically murdering scientific personnel and transferring their consciousnesses into androids visually identical to the originals.
Test subjects began exhibiting increased aggression. Regular doses of specialized tranquilizers and mandatory medical examinations were prescribed.
Representatives of the Syndicate approached Dr. Reiner, offering to purchase her research.

Dr. Reiner was caught attempting to leak data to the Syndicate. She was escorted to Corporate HQ along with her closest staff — secretly androids. The remaining personnel were ordered to freeze all research and await further instructions.
A shortage of tranquilizers caused the android staff's mental state to deteriorate rapidly.
The Corporation dispatched your crew to evacuate the remaining personnel and prisoners.
Dr. Howard Meyer completely lost his mind. He locked himself in the aft section, intent on reaching the reactor and destroying the ship.

contract.heading: CORPORATE CONTRACT — FORM TW-7
contract.briefing: One week ago, Dr. Sofia Reiner — head of the R&D lab aboard the Twilight — was caught attempting to transfer classified information to the Syndicate. Dr. Reiner was escorted to HQ along with two top-clearance staff members. The remaining personnel were ordered to freeze operations and await further instructions.
contract.authorization: The Corporation has now authorized your squad to complete the evacuation.
contract.task1: Evacuate the employees (6 people) and the corporate prisoners (5 people). A crew manifest has been transmitted to each contractor.
contract.task2: Activate the ship's autonomous mode via the internal control panel.
contract.ndaReminder: The Corporation reminds you of your signed NDAs. Exercise extreme caution when transporting prisoners to the corporate vessel's cryopods.
contract.compensationIntro: Contractor payment is released after the Twilight is secured, evacuees are transferred, and corporate property is returned in acceptable condition. The Corporation reserves the right to adjust final compensation after incident review.
contract.ndaClause: NDA CLAUSE: Viewing, copying, selling, or disclosing secured data is strictly prohibited.
contract.liability: § 14.2 — DEDUCTIONS: Damage to corporate property, unauthorized handling of research assets, or harm inflicted upon Twilight personnel may reduce or void contractor pay after case-by-case review.
